name: Mailchimp
excerpt: Content Cucumber writes the emails that get opened. Mailchimp delivers them, measures them, and routes the follow-up. Welcome, cart, post-purchase, win-back, replenishment. Real humans writing real Mailchimp programs. Mailchimp partner agency.
content:
Content Cucumber writes the emails that get opened. Mailchimp delivers them, measures them, and routes the follow-up. Together, strategy and execution meet a platform that scales with the brand.

Why Mailchimp customers choose CC

Mailchimp is built to scale. Customer Journey Builder, segmentation, A/B testing, SMS, eCommerce integrations, predicted demographics. A typical Mailchimp account uses a fraction of what it pays for. That is where we come in.

  • We write the emails that get opened. Real humans, on-voice, no fluff.
  • We build the journeys that get used. Welcome, cart, post-purchase, win-back, replenishment.
  • We turn the segments you already have into revenue. A typical account runs 3-5 segments. We build the 15-25 a real program needs.
  • We coordinate email and SMS so they reinforce instead of compete. Mailchimp's email + SMS bundle is our default for both-channel programs.
  • We report in language your team understands. Mailchimp metrics translated into the numbers your CFO asks about.

Four ways we plug in

  • Mailchimp Audit. Scored audit of your account, co-branded with Mailchimp. Findings map directly to Mailchimp features so your team can act inside the platform.
  • Email + SMS Content. Real humans writing real Mailchimp campaigns, journeys, newsletters, and SMS sends.
  • Automation Builds. Welcome, abandoned cart, browse abandon, post-purchase, win-back, re-engagement, lifecycle programs built directly inside your account.
  • Managed Mailchimp Programs. The whole program run as a service. Strategy, content, builds, sends, reporting, optimization.

Where Mailchimp is strongest, we double down

  • Customer Journey Builder. A typical account has one or two journeys built. We build the full lifecycle map.
  • Segments. We build out the 15-25 segments a real program needs.
  • eCommerce integrations. Native connections with Shopify, BigCommerce, WooCommerce, and Magento. Order data becomes automation triggers.
  • SMS. Mailchimp's email + SMS bundle changes the partnership economics. Email and SMS coordinated, not duplicated.
  • Predicted demographics. Mailchimp's audience insights let us segment beyond what most teams know they have.

Why partner together?

Mailchimp delivers the engine. We deliver the fuel. Content, programs, and the people to keep both running. You stay on Mailchimp. We make Mailchimp work harder.

For Mailchimp customers. Free 15-minute audit, no pressure. Co-branded paid audit. Implementation directly inside your account.

For Mailchimp account managers. Send us your underutilized accounts, accounts with engagement decline, or accounts asking about content help. We run the audit, recommend a path, and report back. Customer keeps their account. Mailchimp gets retention. Content Cucumber gets program work.
